matchingLocations.title: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening

preview.canonicalTitle: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
preview.canonicalBody:
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:START -->
ATLAS-CARD-ID: `mazer-cross-viewport-ui-reliability`
- project: `Mazer`
- type: `reliability`
- state: `review`
- priority: `High`
- owner: `Mazer`
- progress: `84%`
- autonomous implementation: `not_admitted`
- updated: `2026-07-16T05:25:00.000Z`

## Summary
Coordinate mobile safe-area, overlay containment, browser layout, and touch-control behavior through one viewport contract and physical-device proof path.

## Objective
- Keep every Mazer surface contained and usable across desktop, narrow browser, phone browser, and installed PWA while preserving one dete... [see journal/source]

## Acceptance criteria
- Every primary Mazer surface has an owner, supported viewport category, and no-overlap contract.
- Mobile and browser layout work can be verified independently and together through a shared matrix.
- 2 more item(s) in journal/source

## Discoveries
- The compact guide card began six pixels behind its viewport mask after scrollbar-center adjustment.
- 2 more item(s) in journal/source

## Next actions
- Review and merge Mazer PR #77 without mixing unrelated product work.
- After a separately authorized production release, verify guide containment, one-tile wall fallback, T-junction behav... [see journal/source]
- Keep installed-PWA banding and native browser-chrome/maximize proof open.

## Blockers
- Physical iPhone post-release feel and containment verification is pending.

## Evidence
- Mazer draft PR #77 at b3da05dc452983a1b51a257ae128293d98a96ddb.
- 3 more item(s) in journal/source
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:END -->
preview.journalBody:
ATLAS-JOURNAL-EVENT-ID: `mazer-cross-viewport-control-review-20260716`
- card: `mazer-cross-viewport-ui-reliability`
- idempotency: `mazer-cross-viewport-control-review-20260716`
## Mobile guide and held-control rework is review-ready
- kind: `review`
- state: `review`
- actor: `Mazer`
- occurred: `2026-07-16T05:25:00.000Z`

## Completed
- Aligned the compact Player Guide with its viewport mask.
- Separated decisive queued turns from weak analog wall-only fallbacks.
- Kept captured arrow and stick repeats alive while blocked and preserved arrow capture beyond the frame and through the center.
- Completed focused, full-repository, build, and isolated browser proof.

## Discovered
- Earlier deterministic proof did not supersede the operator's later physical-device regression evidence.
- The active coordinating card must remain below completion until the repaired production build is checked on the physical iPhone.

## Next
- Review and merge Mazer PR #77.
- Run physical-iPhone post-release verification before lifecycle completion or marker ratchet.

## Blockers
- Physical iPhone post-release verification remains pending.

## Evidence
- https://github.com/fawxzzy/mazer/pull/77
- Mazer commit b3da05dc452983a1b51a257ae128293d98a96ddb
- repos/mazer/docs/ops/MAZER-MOBILE-CONTROL-INTENT-REWORK-2026-07-16.md
